remarks: Nestled in the heart of Silvermine, tucked away, yet close to it all, this Condo and complex are truly one of a kind. This 2 bed, 2.5 bath unit has been beautifully renovated. It's sophisticated with timeless style! The sun filled, open concept floor plan is designed for both everyday comfort and entertaining. The main floor features a generously sized Living Room with sliders to a private deck with skylines views of the well manicured grounds. This room anchors the Condo with its wood burning fireplace. The Dining Room is highlighted by a gorgeous, big window and opens to the completely renovated, modern and chic Kitchen. Granite counters, stainless appliances, elegant tile work and ample cabinetry make this space shine. Upstairs you'll find the oversized Primary Bedroom that is sophisticated and relaxing. The Primary Bath is well sized and updated with a large linen closet and gorgeous tub and shower. The Guest Room is private with a full bath, making it ideal for living or as a home office. The laundry is conveniently located on this floor and adds to the condo's smart functionality. Additional amenities include an attached one-car Garage and a Storage Room conveniently located just off the garage. Residents enjoy beautifully landscaped grounds, a sparkling swimming pool, and a pet-friendly community. Just moments from the Merritt 7 Metro-North station and close to and all that Norwalk has to offer. Asking for all offers by July 16th at 9pm. Please use the SMART MLS P&S.
